title: CEO-Bench tests whether AI agents can run a startup for 500 simulated days
friendlyTitle: A new test asks AI to run a fake startup
summary: Princeton researchers built CEO-Bench, a long-horizon benchmark where agents manage a fictional software startup through pricing, hiring-like resource choices, customer feedback, and market changes over 500 simulated days.
friendlySummary: CEO-Bench gives AI agents a simulated company and checks whether they can keep it alive over 500 business days.
whyItMatters: The benchmark highlights a gap between short task competence and long-term steering. Businesses should be careful about delegating strategic decisions to agents until those systems can handle delayed feedback and changing conditions reliably.
friendlyWhyItMatters: It reminds us that doing one task well is not the same as making good decisions for months. Strategy is still hard for AI.
